case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CAROL EVELYN REBEIRO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT REBEIRO, CAROL EVELYN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $335.12 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REBEIRO, CAROL EVELYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CAROL EVELYN REBEIRO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REBEIRO, CAROL EVELYN $192.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $272.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REBEIRO, CAROL EVELYN
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
